item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Broccoli and edamame patties with texture and flavour, served with a coarsebulgur salad, also available with rice as a gluten free option, filled withfresh vegetables and herbs. Topped with roasted carrot tapenade. Creamytzatziki on the side (1+6+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Melanzane alla parmigiana with aubergine in rich tomato sauce and plenty ofparmesan, served with rosemary roasted potatoes and pea shoots. Crisp salad andlemon vinaigrette on the side (6+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Crushed and crispy potatoes served with boiled egg and creamed spinach withwild garlic, topped with chives and crunchy textures (2+6+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Crisp tartlets filled with a creamy vegetable stew of mushrooms, celeriac, peasand carrots, classic and comforting (1+2+6+10+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Hearty taco soup packed with beans and vegetables, warm and comforting, toppedwith grated cheddar and spring onions. Tortillachips and lime on the side (6+13+15)
